description: A designed graphic on a light textured background. A red 'WANTED' banner sits at the upper left over a booking-style portrait of an older man with short gray-flecked hair in a striped shirt. A red caption bar reads 'CHILD EXPLOITATION'. An ICE logo and a red footer reading 'SEND TIPS to 866-DHS-2-ICE' are at the bottom.
notable_text: WANTED; CHILD EXPLOITATION; ICE; SEND TIPS to 866-DHS-2-ICE
